prompts.best_for: Bold editorial declarations, authoritative single-point insights, magazine-style authority statements
prompts.prompt: Editorial style social media graphic, minimalist poster design, textured off-white paper background, bold deep red sans-serif typography on the left {{TEXT_PLACEHOLDER_1}}, right-aligned photographic cutout of a person in a vintage brown leather jacket holding an open magazine, full figure from head to toe must be visible and uncropped within the right column, distinct magazine aesthetic, high contrast, studio lighting, grain overlay, top border line with small caption {{TEXT_PLACEHOLDER_2}}. No body text zone exists — left column contains the headline only. Do not generate lorem ipsum or filler text.
prompts.layout: Asymmetrical two-column grid. Left column dominates with heavy typography (approx 60% width), right column features photographic element (approx 40% width). Top header bar acts as a container.
prompts.visual_hierarchy: 1. Main Headline (Large Scale, left column) -> 2. Photographic Cutout (Human Element, right column, full figure visible) -> 3. Top Caption Bar (small caption label). No body text block exists in this layout.
prompts.focal_point: The large headline text on the left.
prompts.white_space: Generous usage of negative space in the top left and around the text block, creating a breathable, high-end editorial feel.
prompts.balance: Asymmetrical balance achieved by counterweighing the visual weight of the bold, large typography on the left with the complex texture and dark values of the image cutout on the right.
prompts.positioning: Left text alignment with ragged right. Main headline has tight leading (approx 90%). Top separator line is 1px stroke weight, full width. Person's head must sit no higher than 8% from the top edge of the canvas — never above the canvas boundary.
prompts.shadows: Subtle, hard-edge drop shadow or outline effect may be present on the person cutout to separate from background, though minimal.
prompts.gradients: None. Flat colors with texture overlay.
prompts.borders: None on main elements. 1px black horizontal divider line at top (approx 5% from top edge).
prompts.textures: Subtle paper grain/noise texture applied to the off-white background to simulate a printed page.
prompts.heading: Helvetica Neue / Inter - Bold / Heavy - Very Large (~120pt)

prompts.best_for: Mental health topics, stress/burnout content, hidden struggles, emotional vulnerability, overwhelm themes
prompts.prompt: Studio portrait of a person wearing a blue baseball cap and black long-sleeve shirt, hands covering face in a gesture of stress or contemplation, face completely obscured by a solid royal blue organic blob shape containing centered white text {{TEXT_PLACEHOLDER_1}}, background is a light gray textured paper, brutalist graphic design style. Large, tall, condensed blue typography {{TEXT_PLACEHOLDER_2}} layered behind the head but in front of background. A black grunge tape strip with white text {{TEXT_PLACEHOLDER_3}} angled across the top left. Thin, wavy black doodle lines emanating from the shoulders to the edges. High contrast, magazine cover aesthetic, poster design. Do not generate lorem ipsum or filler text.
prompts.layout: Central composition with a strong vertical axis. The subject anchors the bottom, while the typography forms an inverted pyramid structure at the top.
prompts.visual_hierarchy: 1. The massive condensed typography (TEXT_PLACEHOLDER_2) and the face-obscuring blue blob (TEXT_PLACEHOLDER_1). 2. The provocative black tape text (TEXT_PLACEHOLDER_3). 3. The subject's hands and cap. No body text area exists in this layout.
prompts.focal_point: The blue blob covering the face, which acts as a container for the hook text.
prompts.white_space: Ample negative space in the upper corners and background texture prevents the bold elements from feeling claustrophobic.
prompts.balance: Symmetrical subject placement balanced by slightly asymmetrical typography (angled tape) and organic wavy lines.
prompts.positioning: Subject centered horizontally. Top padding for tags approx 60px. Large typography text spans ~90% of width.
prompts.shadows: Hard drop shadow on the black tape element to simulate a physical sticker. Soft, diffused ambient shading on the person's hands.
prompts.gradients: Flat colors primarily; slight lighting gradient on the blue cap.
prompts.borders: No borders on main elements. 2px black wavy vector lines framing the subject.
prompts.textures: Subtle film grain/noise on the light gray background.
prompts.heading: Dharma Gothic / Impact / Akzidenz Grotesk Condensed - Condensed Bold - Extra Large (~150pt)

prompts.best_for: Creative blocks, thinking frameworks, analytical tips, intellectual concepts, strategy breakdowns
prompts.prompt: A high-contrast mixed media collage graphic in the style of a digital zine. Center subject is a grayscale cutout photo of a person in a thoughtful pose, wearing a turtleneck, arms crossed, hand on chin. The person's face is completely obscured by a solid black organic shape, creating a void. The subject has a rough, vibrant electric blue outline. Background is stark white with a black halftone dot pattern at the bottom corners. Surrounding the head are thin blue connector lines pointing to text blocks containing {{TEXT_PLACEHOLDER_2}}. Top contains bold, extended sans-serif typography {{TEXT_PLACEHOLDER_1}}. Supporting label {{TEXT_PLACEHOLDER_3}}. Minimalist, edgy, modern graphic design style. Do not generate lorem ipsum or filler text.
prompts.layout: Centralized symmetrical composition. The subject anchors the center, with a headline stack at the top and informational points distributed radially around the head using a hub-and-spoke model.
prompts.visual_hierarchy: 1. The Headline (TEXT_PLACEHOLDER_1, due to size and contrast blocks) 2. The Faceless Subject (central position and black void anomaly) 3. The Blue Accents and connector lines pointing to sub-point text (TEXT_PLACEHOLDER_2) 4. Supporting label (TEXT_PLACEHOLDER_3). No filler body text — all text zones must be filled from the post content.
prompts.focal_point: The blacked-out face of the subject, which creates a curiosity gap and symbolizes the block or the mind.
prompts.white_space: Generous use of negative space around the peripheral text blocks ensures legibility, though the center is dense.
prompts.balance: Symmetrical balance. The text blocks on left and right counterbalance each other, and the headline spans the full width.
prompts.positioning: Center alignment for the main subject. Headline text is center-aligned. Body text is aligned towards the subject (left text right-aligned, right text left-aligned).
prompts.shadows: No soft shadows. Hard-edge drop shadows are implied by the black background blocks behind the white text in the headline.
prompts.borders: A rough, hand-drawn style blue stroke (~3-5px width) surrounds the subject cutout.
prompts.textures: Halftone dot pattern (Ben-Day dots) located at the bottom left and right corners to ground the subject, fading from black to transparent.
prompts.heading: Eurostile Extended Bold or Integral CF - Bold, All Caps, Extended - Very Large (approx 80pt)
